args.query: SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(artist)=lower('Brucqe Maginnis') AND lower(title)=lower('Street Hype');

args.query: SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(artist) LIKE lower('%bruc%maginn%') AND lower(title) LIKE lower('%street%hype%');

args.query: SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE lower('%street%hype%') LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE lower('%street%hype%') LIMIT 200;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;
